data.name: AboutTitle
data.value: Madinaty is a trusted name in premium furnished apartments across Alexandria, backed by more than 10 years of experience

data.name: AboutSubtitle
data.value: At Madinaty, we offer a distinguished collection of furnished apartments across Alexandria, including first-row sea view residences and luxury second-row apartments with elegant hotel-style furnishing, refined comfort, and premium hospitality.

data.name: Stat1Label
data.value: Years of experience in furnished apartments

data.name: Stat2Label
data.value: Apartments across all key areas of Alexandria

data.name: Stat3Label
data.value: First-row sea view apartments in premium locations

data.name: Stat4Label
data.value: Second-row luxury apartments with hotel furnishing

data.name: WhoWeAreText
data.value: With more than ten years of experience, Madinaty has become a trusted destination for premium furnished apartments in Alexandria. Our portfolio includes apartments in prime locations across the city, whether you are looking for a direct sea-front stay or a luxury second-row apartment with elegant hotel-style furnishing and a calm, refined atmosphere.

data.name: StoryTitle
data.value: At Madinaty, we do not only offer apartments, we create a complete luxury stay experience

data.name: StoryText
data.value: Our focus is not only on location, but also on quality, comfort, and presentation. We carefully provide apartments that match different lifestyles and preferences, from stunning first-row sea view units to sophisticated luxury apartments in the second row, all prepared with tasteful finishes and hotel-style furnishing to deliver a stay that feels elegant, comfortable, and memorable.

data.name: CollectionText
data.value: We provide a wide variety of furnished apartments across Alexandria to meet different tastes and needs, while maintaining a high standard of elegance, cleanliness, and premium hospitality.

data.name: Category1Title
data.value: Direct sea-view apartments in the most beautiful parts of Alexandria

data.name: Category1Text
data.value: Our first-row apartments offer direct views of the sea, open balconies, fresh air, and a unique feeling of calm and luxury. They are ideal for guests looking for a premium coastal experience with unforgettable scenery.

data.name: Category1Point4
data.value: Perfect for a calm and refined stay

data.name: Category2Title
data.value: Luxury furnished apartments with hotel-style finishing and premium comfort

data.name: Category2Text
data.value: Our second-row luxury apartments combine privacy, stylish interiors, and hotel-style furnishing. They are perfect for guests who want a high-end stay experience with elegance, comfort, and excellent value.

data.name: WhyChooseText
data.value: Our experience, variety, and attention to detail make us a trusted choice for guests looking for premium furnished apartments in Alexandria.

data.name: Why1Text
data.value: A large portfolio of apartments across Alexandria to suit different needs and preferences.

data.name: Why2Text
data.value: From first-row sea-front apartments to elegant nearby luxury units in premium areas.

data.name: Why3Text
data.value: Carefully selected furniture, tasteful interiors, and a refined atmosphere in every stay.

data.name: Why4Text
data.value: More than ten years of experience serving guests with quality, professionalism, and care.

data.name: CtaTitle
data.value: Discover your ideal stay in Alexandria

data.name: CtaText
data.value: Whether you are looking for a direct sea-front apartment or a luxury furnished unit with hotel-style comfort, we are ready to help you find the perfect option.
